data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a cleaner completes a turnover checklist and that the host receives notification and signs off on any damage. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of these processes, such as API reads or persisted state checks. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, particularly regarding the damage report and host acknowledgment.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the turnover checklist completion and host acknowledgment of damage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
